description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a classic bulbous body and a narrow neck that flares outward at the rim. The surface is predominantly white, adorned with intricate cobalt blue floral and branch motifs reminiscent of traditional East Asian porcelain. The neck features two parallel blue bands, adding a refined accent to the overall design. The floral patterns are distributed evenly around the body, with some branches extending gracefully up toward the neck. The vase has a smooth, glossy finish, enhancing the vibrancy of the blue and white color scheme. Its proportions and decorative style suggest it is intended as a statement piece for display in refined urban environments.
description: A tall, white ceramic vase with cobalt blue floral and branch motifs, featuring a glossy finish and elegant, flared neck.
description_view_0: The vase displays a prominent blue floral branch motif on the front, with the neck's blue bands clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a denser cluster of blue flowers and branches, with the pattern wrapping smoothly around the body.
description_view_2: The floral motif appears more sparse, with longer, thinner branches and fewer blossoms visible on this side.
description_view_3: A large, bold cluster of blue flowers dominates the surface, with the neck's blue bands and rim in clear view.
